name: Discover it® Student Cash Back

welcome_offer.description: Discover matches ALL cash back earned at the end of first year (unlimited dollar-for-dollar match)

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on rotating categories (up to $1,500/quarter then 1%)
1% unlimited cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Free FICO score
other_benefits.description: Free access to your FICO credit score

other_benefits.name: Good Grade Reward
other_benefits.description: $20 statement credit each school year you maintain a 3.5 GPA or above

other_benefits.name: 0% intro APR
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 6 months on purchases, then 16.49%-25.49% variable

notes: Student version of Discover it Cash Back. Rotating 5% categories (Amazon, Gas, Restaurants, etc.). Cashback Match doubles first year earnings. Good for students building credit.
